title.rendered: Echo Park Swan Boats Appear on Billboards for new HBO Show

content.rendered:
Wheel Fun Rentals’ iconic Swan Boats at Echo Park are making a splash across Los Angeles!

You can now spot our famous swans featured on billboards throughout the city promoting HBO’s brand-new series I Love LA! The show’s promo shoot took place right at Echo Park Lake, capturing the beauty and charm of one of LA’s most beloved landmarks. We’re thrilled to see our Swan Boats showcased in this campaign — a perfect reflection of the fun, sunshine, and signature LA vibes we love!

Ready to experience the magic for yourself? Wheel Fun Rentals’ swan boats are available at several locations in the greater LA area including Echo Park Lake, Lake Balboa in Van Nuys, and Rainbow Lagoon in Long Beach! Hours vary by location and reservations are required at Echo Park and Rainbow Lagoon, click below to book your LA Swan Boat ride today!

 

Book Your Echo Park LA Swan Boat Experience!

 

Book Your Rainbow Lagoon LA Swan Boat Experience!
